creator: des@FreeBSD.org
text: I've tried to debug this (it affects some of my production systems as well), but with no luck so far.  As, nss_ldap does not work at all in my environment without the krb5 / gssapi patches, I can't easily compare working and non-working versions.  Can you give me a full trace (loglevel 255) from both versions?  Can you provide access to a VM or jail in a test environment?
